---
title: "Feature: Display all categories"
labels: feature, categories, backend, required
---

**Phase 1 — CategoriesController.**

As a shopper, I want to view all product categories so that I can browse products by category.

### Tasks
- [ ] Add the correct mapping annotation in `CategoriesController`.
- [ ] Create or complete the service method to get all categories.
- [ ] Call the service from the controller.
- [ ] Test the endpoint in Insomnia with `GET http://localhost:8080/categories`.

### Done when
- The endpoint returns a list of all categories
- The controller calls the category service
- The service gets data from the category repository
